summary: Iteration 8 — UX/Design Refonte: Couleur Terracotta → Doré Sauge #9E7E4A, Leaf icon HeroSection, FAQ accordion, Button outline hover. All 13 test cases PASS. Frontend 100%.
critical_code_review_comments: HeroSection.jsx: Leaf icon + label-tag correctly implemented. 'Voir les offres' outline button correctly uses inline style { borderColor: '#9E7E4A', color: '#9E7E4A' }.
button.jsx outline variant: hover:bg-transparent correctly set — CSS rule '.hover:bg-transparent:hover { background-color: transparent; }' confirmed in compiled CSS.
accordion.jsx: --radix-accordion-content-height: 'auto' fallback works. FAQ on /solution opens/closes 9 questions correctly.
tailwind.config.js: safelist includes accordion animate classes. terracotta and accent both set to #9E7E4A. #C27A62 fully replaced.

NOTE: Home.jsx hero secondary button ('Voir un exemple de page') uses borderColor: '#E2DFD8', color: '#2C352D' (intentional — Home has its own hero). The bottom CTA 'Voir les offres' on Home uses rgba(249,246,240,0.3) on dark background (intentional design). No issues.
test_credentials: Admin: /admin/login, password JQi]=3+8Azc4 (not needed for this test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8: All UX refonte checks pass 100%. Colors fully migrated from #C27A62 to #9E7E4A across all JSX files. HeroSection Leaf icon works on /solution, /offres, /exemples, /blog, /contact. FAQ accordion on /solution opens 9 questions correctly. Button outline hover:bg-transparent confirmed in compiled CSS. No old terracotta color (#C27A62 / rgba(194,122,98)) detected in any rendered HTML page.
